overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a gothic castle interior with stone corridors, stained glass windows, and a library, before exiting to an outdoor sunset scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the castle corridor toward a wooden door

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing by the door holding a polearm

entered.detail: large colorful stained glass window with blue and yellow patterns in gothic frame
tall cylindrical stone pillar supporting the vaulted ceiling
red and white checkered marble tile floor
large dark wooden door with metal studs at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow gothic corridor with checkered marble floors and tall stone columns. Colorful stained glass windows line the right wall while a guard stands watch near a large wooden door at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle interior corridor with weapon displays

events.description: passing through the wooden door into an inner corridor

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the inner castle corridors passing guards

notable_agents.action: guard standing against the wall near weapon displays

entered.detail: circular arrangement of swords and spears mounted on the stone wall
lit torch in an ornate wall-mounted bracket

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the door, Geralt enters a torch-lit inner corridor decorated with circular weapon displays on the walls. The checkered floor continues as stone columns recede into the distance and guards stand watch along the walls.

events.description: beginning to ascend the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing the stone spiral staircase

entered.detail: worn stone spiral staircase with narrow steps
burning torch mounted on the curved stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the main corridor and begins ascending a narrow spiral staircase. The walls are lit by burning torches as he climbs the worn stone steps upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle library with bookshelves and reading tables

events.description: entering the large library room from the staircase
approaching a large portrait on the wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking around the library, examining bookshelves and tables

entered.detail: tall dark wooden bookshelf filled with leather-bound books
wooden table with open books and lit candelabras
tall arched window with blue tinted glass
large framed painting of a robed figure in red and gold
ornate red rug under the reading table

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a spacious library with high ceilings and gothic windows. The room contains tall bookshelves, reading tables with candles, and a large portrait. He explores the room, walking past stone columns and ornate rugs as natural light filters through the arched windows.

events.description: exiting the library through a wooden door into a corridor
approaching the exit with bright outdoor light visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the corridor toward the building exit

notable_agents.action: guard standing watch in the corridor

entered.detail: large wooden door leading outside with bright light visible through gaps

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the library and walks through a final corridor toward the exit. Guards stand watch along the walls as he approaches a large wooden door with bright golden light streaming from outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field at sunset with large dead tree

events.description: exiting the building into the outdoor environment at sunset

agents.ego_description: Geralt stepping out of the castle into the open field

entered.detail: large gnarled dead tree with hanging objects silhouetted against the sky
bright orange and red sunset sky with scattered clouds
grassy field with a dirt path

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the castle into a vast open field bathed in golden sunset light. A large dead tree stands prominently against the colorful sky as he steps onto the dirt path surrounded by grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the oppressive stone interiors of a gothic castle that eventually opens into a vast, sun-drenched landscape. It begins with Geralt walking through a narrow corridor of checkered marble and stained glass, passing a guard before moving into a torch-lit inner hall lined with circular weapon displays. The camera then follows him as he ascends a narrow spiral staircase lit by flickering torches, leading into a spacious library filled with towering bookshelves and natural light filtering through arched windows. After traversing the library and passing through a final guarded corridor, the scene shifts toward a large wooden door where bright golden light begins to stream inward. Finally, the camera exits the castle entirely, emerging into an open field bathed in the warm glow of a sunset with a prominent dead tree standing against the colorful sky.
